scripts.dev: concurrently "next dev" "uv run --directory python-backend uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8100"
scripts.build:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.next',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && next build
scripts.verify:deps: uv lock --check && uv run --locked python -m pip check && npm ci --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate
scripts.verify:python:full: uv run --locked python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v
scripts.verify:python:research: uv run --locked python -m unittest tests.test_options_api_e2e tests.test_market_data_service tests.test_metric_truth_audit tests.test_expectancy_calibration tests.test_wfo_optimizer_calibration tests.test_autoresearch_cycle tests.test_options_chatbot_timezone_sweep tests.test_strategy_profile_safety -v

scripts.verify:fast: npm run verify:python:research && npm run daytrading:test
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:python:full && npm run daytrading:test && npm run polymarket:test && npm run verify:smoke && npm run build
scripts.verify:node: npm run trading-desk:test && npm run strategy-lab:test && npm run ui:test
scripts.verify:ci:local: npm run verify:deps && npm run verify:docs && npm run lint && npm run verify:typecheck && npm run verify:node && npm run verify:full
scripts.verify:proof-readbacks: npm run accuracy:report && npm run profit-loop:dry-report
scripts.verify:e2e:local: npm run verify:ci:local && npm run verify:proof-readbacks
scripts.verify:e2e:strict: npm run verify:ci:local && npm run verify:accuracy:no-write && npm run verify:profit-loop:dry
